displayName: United Arab Emirates – Spouse / Dependent Visa
shortDescription: Resident sponsor · Salary & Ejari · Dubai, Sharjah, Abu Dhabi · India route

policyAlert.summary: Dependent visa requires resident sponsor meeting salary/accommodation rules. Verify GDRFA/ICP criteria for sponsor emirate.

alert.title: Sponsor eligibility critical
alert.body: Sponsor must hold valid UAE residence visa with minimum salary (typically AED 4,000+ for spouse — verify current GDRFA rule) and Ejari-registered accommodation.

about.label: Description
about.value: Residence visa for spouse or eligible dependants of a UAE resident sponsor in Dubai, Sharjah, or Abu Dhabi. Applied from India with attested relationship documents.

about.label: Eligible applicants
about.value: Legally married spouse or eligible dependants · Sponsor with valid UAE residence · Minimum salary threshold · Ejari-registered tenancy · Attested marriage/birth certificates

about.label: Sponsor salary rule
about.value: Minimum salary typically AED 4,000+ for spouse sponsorship — verify current GDRFA/ICP emirate rule before filing.

about.label: Key authority
about.value: GDRFA (emirate) · ICP UAE · Sponsor employer PRO or typing centre

about.label: After approval
about.value: Dependent enters on entry permit; completes medical; Emirates ID; residence stamping.

eligibility.criterion: Sponsor holds valid UAE residence visa

redFlagsBanner: Salary or Ejari gaps are the top refusal reasons — verify sponsor file before dependent travels.

redFlags.title: Salary below threshold
redFlags.fix: Salary certificate from employer; verify rule

redFlags.title: Sponsor on visit visa
redFlags.description: Visit visa holder cannot sponsor dependants.
redFlags.fix: Sponsor must convert to residence first

faqs.q: Can a student sponsor spouse?
faqs.a: Depends on institution and emirate — many students cannot sponsor until employment visa; assess case-by-case.

faqs.q: What salary is required?
faqs.a: Typically AED 4,000+ for spouse — verify current GDRFA Dubai/Sharjah/Abu Dhabi rule.

faqs.q: Can dependent work?
faqs.a: May apply for work permit separately if eligible — not automatic on dependent visa.

faqs.q: What is Description for this service?
faqs.a: Residence visa for spouse or eligible dependants of a UAE resident sponsor in Dubai, Sharjah, or Abu Dhabi. Applied from India with attested relationship documents.

faqs.q: What is Eligible applicants for this service?
faqs.a: Legally married spouse or eligible dependants · Sponsor with valid UAE residence · Minimum salary threshold · Ejari-registered tenancy · Attested marriage/birth certificates

faqs.q: What is Sponsor salary rule for this service?
faqs.a: Minimum salary typically AED 4,000+ for spouse sponsorship — verify current GDRFA/ICP emirate rule before filing.

faqs.q: What is Key authority for this service?
faqs.a: GDRFA (emirate) · ICP UAE · Sponsor employer PRO or typing centre

faqs.q: What is After approval for this service?
faqs.a: Dependent enters on entry permit; completes medical; Emirates ID; residence stamping.

faqs.q: Is Sponsor holds valid UAE residence visa required?
faqs.a: Sponsor holds valid UAE residence visa is typically required.

faqs.q: Is Sponsor salary meets minimum (AED 4,000+ typical) required?
faqs.a: Verify emirate rule

faqs.q: Is Ejari-registered accommodation required?
faqs.a: Ejari-registered accommodation is typically required.

faqs.q: Is Attested marriage certificate (MOFA UAE) required?
faqs.a: MEA → UAE Embassy → MOFA UAE

faqs.q: Is Dependent passport 6+ months valid required?
faqs.a: Dependent passport 6+ months valid is typically required.

faqs.q: Is Relationship proof genuine and documented required?
faqs.a: Relationship proof genuine and documented is typically required.

faqs.q: Can Future Link guarantee approval?
faqs.a: No. Government authorities decide each case. Never promise approval.

faqs.q: What documents should we collect first?
faqs.a: Passport, application forms, fees, and the service checklist in the Checklist tab.

faqs.q: How long does processing take?
faqs.a: See KPI processing time — always verify current GDRFA/ICP timelines before quoting.

faqs.q: What are government fees?
faqs.a: Confirm latest fees on the official portal in the Resources section before quoting.

faqs.q: Can the client apply from India?
faqs.a: Yes — standard route for Indian nationals via sponsor, VFS, or ICP e-visa as applicable.

faqs.q: What if the client was refused before?
faqs.a: Disclose all refusals, overstays, and bans; address GDRFA fines before reapply.

faqs.q: Can the client work on this visa?
faqs.a: Work rights depend on visa type — employment visa required for full-time work.

faqs.q: United Arab Emirates – Spouse / Dependent Visa: counselor verification point 22?
faqs.a: Confirm eligibility, checklist sign-off, current fees, and client consent before submission.

compliance: Client service agreement and consent must be on file before submission
Never guarantee visa or immigration approval; use approved-language only
Fee quotes must separate consultancy, government, and third-party costs
Verify licensed institution or employer before collecting full fees
proTips: Collect sponsor salary certificate and Ejari early
Attest marriage certificate before India exit
Match application to sponsor's emirate GDRFA
postApproval: Guide on GDRFA / ICP residence permit appointment
Advise on integration courses if required

staffNotes.author: Documentation team
staffNotes.text: Coordinate with sponsor in UAEy early—lease and salary docs often delay files.

quiz.question: Spouses generally need UAE level:
options: C2
A1 basic
None ever
Native only
quiz.explanation: Basic UAE A1 typically required.

quiz.question: After entry spouse must:
options: Ignore registration
Register and apply residence permit
Work without permit
Leave in 1 week
quiz.explanation: Anmeldung and GDRFA / ICP required.
